name: Adam Blitzer
background: Adam Blitzer has served as our Chief Operating Officer since 2021. Prior to joining Datadog, Mr. Blitzer held various executive roles at Salesforce, including Executive Vice President and General Manager of Digital (Marketing Cloud, Commerce Cloud, and Experience Cloud). He was the co-founder of Pardot, which was acquired by Salesforce. Mr. Blitzer holds a B.A. from Duke University.
